OWNER_NAME.description: Business owner first name (best guess from context, or "there" if unknown)

ACCENT_COLOR.description: CSS hex color for accent/CTA elements matching their brand

ACCENT_COLOR_LIGHT.description: Light variant of accent color (for backgrounds), CSS hex

ACCENT_COLOR_DARK.description: Dark variant of accent color (for hover states), CSS hex

COMPANY_LOGO_URL.description: URL to company logo if found on their website, or empty string

PHONE_NUMBER.description: Our phone number for the CTA

TESTIMONIAL_1.description: Realistic testimonial quote from a satisfied homeowner (2-3 sentences). Reference specific renovation work matching the company services.

TESTIMONIAL_1_AUTHOR.description: First name and last initial of testimonial author with city, e.g. "Sarah M., London"

TESTIMONIAL_2.description: Second testimonial from a different homeowner (2-3 sentences, different renovation type than the first)

TESTIMONIAL_2_AUTHOR.description: First name and last initial with city, e.g. "Mike T., London"
